import { useState } from 'react'; export default function Navbar() { const [isMenuOpen, setIsMenuOpen] = useState(false); const [isSolutionsOpen, setIsSolutionsOpen] = useState(false); const [isLocationsOpen, setIsLocationsOpen] = useState(false); return (

)}
